rule.description: Arcenum [CRITICAL]: LSASS process access - Attacker attempting to dump credentials from memory using tools like Mimikatz (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [CRITICAL]: SAM/NTDS database access - Attacker extracting AD credentials offline (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: Explicit credential logon - Attacker executing Pass-the-Hash for lateral movement (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: PsExec service installation - Attacker executing commands remotely via SMB lateral movement (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: WMIC remote process creation - Attacker using WMI for fileless lateral movement across endpoints (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: Network logon Type 3 - Attacker authenticating over network via SMB/RPC for lateral movement (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: AD object access - Attacker mapping domain trusts and high-value targets via BloodHound/LDAP (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: AD/local account enumeration commands executed - Attacker discovering local admins and domain group memberships (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [CRITICAL]: Offensive PowerShell framework in script block logging - Attacker executing known post-exploitation frameworks (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: PowerShell obfuscation flags - Attacker attempting to bypass AMSI and hide script execution intent (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: PowerShell remote download and execute - Attacker acting as dropper to fetch secondary payloads (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: Scheduled task created - Attacker establishing persistence to execute payloads on startup or schedule (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: Scheduled task with suspicious executable - Attacker hiding malicious commands within scheduled tasks (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: NewCredentials logon RunAs - Attacker impersonating tokens to bypass UAC or access restricted resources (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
